# Fei Hu — fei.io

> Frontend & AI Engineer with 10+ years shipping production software.

## About

Fei Hu is a frontend and AI engineer based in the US. He builds interfaces people remember — where every interaction feels intentional, the code reads like prose, and the engineering behind it holds up under pressure. Over a decade of shipping brand-defining websites, enterprise dashboards, and SaaS platforms with complex business logic. On time, every time.

These days he is deep in AI: orchestrating multiple models, building RAG pipelines, and wiring up agentic systems that handle real workflows autonomously using MCP tooling and tool-calling patterns. He still cares about every pixel. Now there is intelligence behind it.

He flexes between tech lead and solo operator depending on what is needed — architecting, mentoring, unblocking. Known for communicating clearly, showing up without ego, and keeping the energy right even when timelines shift and requirements mutate.

## Expertise

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, styled-components, framer-motion, Vite
- AI/ML: LLM orchestration, RAG pipelines, agentic systems, MCP tooling, tool-calling
- Backend: Node.js, REST APIs, system architecture
- Leadership: Tech lead, mentoring, cross-functional collaboration
